title: Basedash: AI data analyst: AI-native Business Intelligence Platform | Product Hunt
excerpt: Basedash is the AI-native Business Intelligence platform that lets you create dashboards and understand your customers using natural language. Connect your data, describe the chart you want, and let AI generate the visualization. No SQL required.
content_html: Basedash is the AI-native Business Intelligence platform that lets you create dashboards and understand your customers using natural language. Connect your data, describe the chart you want, and let AI generate the visualization. No SQL required.

sentences.zh: Basedash 是人工智能原生商业智能平台，可让您创建仪表板并使用自然语言了解客户。
